data.title: Krista McDonough Kubida Joins The Wella Company as Chief Legal Officer
data.description: Wella Company, a prominent global leader in hair, nail, and beauty technology, has appointed Krista McDonough Kubida as its Chief Legal Officer starting June 29, 2026. Krista, who previously worked at Capri Holdings Limited, a NYSE-listed fashion luxury group housing renowned brands like Michael Kors and Jimmy Choo, will now be a crucial member of the Wella Leadership Team based in New York City. This strategic move highlights Wella's commitment to strengthening its leadership with top talents from leading industries.

data.title: Wild West Social House Brings Luxury Fashion Rental to the Desert with Square’s Most Dynamic Mobile POS
data.description: In Oakland, California, Wild West Social House, a luxury fashion rental and members' club based in Los Angeles, chose Square Handheld as their portable point-of-sale (POS) device for their off-site activation, "The Wild West Stables," at the Coachella Valley music festival. The collaboration with Square brought their mobile terminal to a challenging retail setting in the desert, where connectivity is unreliable. This partnership allowed Wild West Social House to leverage Square's powerful POS device for a successful activation at the renowned music festival.

data.title: Motorola Solutions Unveils Unified Records and Case Management Platform to Help Accelerate Case Closure
data.description: Motorola Solutions unveiled CommandCentral RMS, a records and case management solution, aiming to streamline reporting and case resolutions for public safety agencies. The system integrates records and evidence for efficient handling. Powered by AI technology Assist, productivity is enhanced through simplified investigative processes, spanning data entry, analysis, and report generation. The cloud-based platform offers a holistic view, aiding in quicker closures of cases. CommandCentral RMS by Motorola Solutions is set to optimize operations both in the office and field.

data.title: Miracle-Gro and KidsGardening Launch New "Growing the Future" Intergenerational Garden Grants
data.description: To celebrate its 75th anniversary, Miracle-Gro will be awarding 75 grants as part of the Growing the Future initiative. The grants aim to commemorate Miracle-Gro's history of cultivation and emphasize the importance of community engagement. The grants will be distributed to various projects that focus on promoting community connections. The initiative reflects Miracle-Gro's commitment to fostering growth and development.

data.title: Revolve Group, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV) has revealed its plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31, during an after-market session slated for Tuesday, May 5, 2026. A subsequent conference call is scheduled to take place at 1:30 PM (PT) / 4:30 PM (ET) on the same day.

data.title: Utility Stock Jumps On Data Center Power Deals With These Tech Giants
data.description: The stock of NiSource experienced a notable increase in value following the announcement of new agreements with technology giants Alphabet and Amazon. These deals involve supplying energy to brand-new AI data centers. This surge in stock value reflects investor confidence in NiSource's potential for growth and profitability due to these high-profile partnerships. The utility company's stock rise is a clear indicator of the positive market response to these significant collaborations in the energy sector.

data.title: Netflix Stock Mauled As Video Streamer Faces Sluggish Growth Outlook
data.description: Netflix experienced a significant drop in its stock value at the end of the week due to the company anticipating slower growth than initially projected for the ongoing quarter. This news shook investors, leading to a decline in the stock price. The streaming service giant faced a sluggish outlook, causing its stock to plummet.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Defense Tech Company AEVEX to Make Its Public Debut
data.description: Today, on April 17, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a pre-market advisory directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. This daily update offers valuable market insights before the trading day begins. Investors can access this pre-market report for a comprehensive overview of the market conditions. Stay informed with the NYSE Pre-market update for essential information to guide your investment decisions.

data.title: BioPhotas Inc., Manufacturer of the Celluma SERIES of Light Therapy Devices, Celebrates 15th Year Anniversary and Introduces Revolutionary New Product
data.description: Located in Tustin, California, on April 17, 2026, BioPhotas, Inc., a prominent provider of therapeutic LED light therapy devices, commemorates its 15th year in business. To honor this milestone, they are launching an innovative new device, adding to the acclaimed Celluma SERIES product line. This development signifies the company's commitment to expansion and advancement in the industry.
